examples: Most often we procrastinate when faced with something we do not want to do.
We all procrastinate sometimes, especially when it comes to things we aren't really fond of.
"Some people procrastinate cleaning. Some people procrastinate by cleaning," says Professor Peter Stone.
They typically procrastinate and develop a pattern of getting things done at the last minute.
Whether you are spontaneous or just love to procrastinate HotelTonight has got you covered.
